titleStmt.title: SII 34.193: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 193. Perungaḷūr, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Vamsōddhārakanātha temple.

summary.p: The ūrār of Peruṅgāḷūr gifted some land as ūr-kīḻ-iṟaiyili to the temple of Kulōttuṅga-chōḻīśvaram-uḍaiyār in the village. Some part containing signatures is missing in the end.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
cakkaravattikaḷ śrī kulōttuṅka cōḻadevaṟkuyāṇṭu nāṟpattaiñcāvatu pe
Icaiñca Ūrōm Eṅkaḷ nāyaṉār Uṭaiyār kulōttuṅka cōḷīcuvaram Uṭaiyāṟku
ttēvatāṉam tirukkokkuṟōṇi vayalukku kīḻpāṟkellai ciṟukaḷūr kuḷattaṅkaraiyil pālaima
ruccūlakkallukkum mēṟkum karuviṭai vayakkalukkum mūvēntaṉ vayakkalukkum ciṟukaḷūr nāṭā
m teṟṟa kuppai tiruttukkun tiruccūlakkallukkum mēṟkum tenpāṟkellai kiḻakkōṭiya Āṟ
ṟukkum mēlpā
rkkellai ta
namala kuḷattu
kaṭaiviṭṭu
va ṭāl
kkum vayalukkum kiḻakkum vaṭapāṟ
kellai kuḷakkōvaikkum peru
ṅkaḷur vayalil kūttan vayakkal
tenvarampē mēṟku nōkki muḷ
ḷikkuḻi Akappaṭat teṟkum Āka I
caintaperu
nāṉkel
lai Uḷ Aka
ppaṭak kuḷa
mum Iḷa ni
lamum mēṉōkkiṉa maramun kīḻnōkkiya kiṇaṟum pu
ṟṟun teṟṟiyum Uṭumpōṭi yāmai taviḻnta nila
mum Oḻiviṉṟiyē Ucarpil Ucattiyum kuḻippi
li kuḻittum koḷḷap peṟuvatāka Ippaṭi Icai
ntu Itu cantarātittavarai Ūṟkīḻiṟaiyili
yāka Attiratēvar tirukkaiyyilē
nīr vārttu pra
ṅkiḷi nā
ṭṭu muru vēḷāṉ E
ḻuttu Ippaṭikku Ivai cōṟaṉ pakaiyiṭaṟi Eḻuttu Itu cāttaṉ
tiṭa ṭayāṉ karikālacōḻappērayaṉ sayiñai Itu nāvalūruṭai
yāṉ nīṟaṇiñcāṉ Ātittaṉāṉa jayaṅkoṇṭacōḻak kīḻcūta nāṭṭu
vēḷāṉeḻuttu Itu vīraṉ cāttaṉāṉa tikaiviḷaṅkucōḻac ciṟukaḷūr nāṭā
ḻvār sayiñai Itu maṇayāṉai sayiñai Itu kaṇavati
Digital edition of SII 34.193 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
